title: SPIFFE/SPIRE for Workload Identity
description: Architect SPIFFE/SPIRE solutions to establish cryptographic workload identity for services. Implement mTLS (mutual TLS) to remove reliance on IP-based security for inter-service communication.
objectives: Architect SPIFFE/SPIRE solutions to establish cryptographic workload identity for services.
Implement mTLS (mutual TLS) to remove reliance on IP-based security for inter-service communication.
